intentSynonyms: look up previous orders in starbucks
fetch a single previous orders in starbucks
view one specific previous orders in starbucks
description: Get the user's previous Starbucks orders with store info, order total, and items. Requires a store number to scope the results.

store_number.description: Store number to scope results (e.g., "53646-283069"). Omit for all stores.

limit.description: Maximum number of orders to return (default 10)
